sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking (41, 16) which was missed
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 41, 'col': 16}])
print("Click (41, 16):")
print("  Board changed:", result.get('board_changed'))
print("  Gameplay changed:", result.get('gameplay_changed'))
print("  No impact:", result.get('no_impact'))

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nMagenta squares:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M':
        print(f"  id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check bottom bar
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
row63 = ascii_lines[63]
b_count = row63.count('B')
print(f"\nBottom bar B count: {b_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
